name: Automatic Skills
description: The official collection of skills bundled with Automatic. Covers the full software development lifecycle — debugging, testing, code review, refactoring, security, API design, documentation, performance, database design, and GitHub automation.

skills.name: automatic
skills.description: Explains how to use Automatic as a skill registry, memory store, and MCP configuration hub. Use at session start to discover skills, load instructions, and retrieve memories.

skills.name: automatic-debugging
skills.description: Systematic process for diagnosing and resolving defects. Use when debugging failures, investigating errors, or reproducing issues.

skills.name: automatic-testing
skills.description: Principles and patterns for writing effective tests. Use when writing unit, integration, or end-to-end tests, or reviewing test quality.

skills.name: automatic-code-review
skills.description: How to conduct and receive effective code reviews. Use when reviewing a PR, requesting review, or improving review quality.

skills.name: automatic-refactoring
skills.description: Techniques for improving code structure without changing behaviour. Use when cleaning up code, reducing complexity, or addressing technical debt.

skills.name: automatic-security-review
skills.description: Security review checklist and threat mindset for any codebase. Use when reviewing code for vulnerabilities, implementing auth, or handling user input.

skills.name: automatic-api-design
skills.description: REST API design conventions, error shapes, versioning, and pagination patterns. Use when designing or reviewing any HTTP API.

skills.name: automatic-documentation
skills.description: Principles for writing READMEs, API docs, ADRs, code comments, and changelogs. Use when creating or improving any technical documentation.

skills.name: automatic-performance
skills.description: Data-driven approach to identifying and resolving performance bottlenecks. Use when investigating slow queries, high latency, or memory growth.

skills.name: automatic-database-design
skills.description: Schema design conventions, normalisation, indexing, and migration practices. Use when designing or reviewing a relational database schema.

skills.name: github-workflow-automation
skills.description: Advanced GitHub Actions workflow automation with AI swarm coordination, intelligent CI/CD pipelines, and comprehensive repository management.
